nferences Presentations FAQ Download Home GSRC GSRC Home Projects Home GSRC Website Skip to sidebar Gigascale Silicon Research Center The Ptolemy group participated in the Gigascale Silicon Research Center (GSRC), which is funded in part by the Micro

enter (GSRC), which is funded in part by the Microelectronics Advanced Research Corporation (MARCO) Edward A. Lee was one of the initial principal investigators. The GSRC website can be found at http://www.gigascale.org Contact Update Help Copyright
